content.quote: “A tree with deep roots fears no storm”
content.p1:
Facing the storm-like change of the AI era and the ever-rising demands of customers, Sun* has chosen a strategy of diversifying capabilities — not only striving to become the elite in its field, but aiming for a higher goal where every Sunner is a “problem-solver”, an expert in resolving every issue and finding answers for every challenge of projects, customers and society.
Inspired by this diversity of capability, the agility to grow and the spirit of digging deep to break through in the AI era, “Root Further” was chosen as the official theme of the Sun* Annual Awards 2025.
Beyond its surface meaning, “Root Further” is our journey of reaching ever farther, rooting ever deeper, touching hidden “geological” layers to keep surviving, rising and nurturing the burning passion of Sun* people to create value. Like roots relentlessly driving into the earth, weaving through every layer of “sediment” to absorb the finest essence, Sun* people are also “absorbing” nutrients from the era and the challenges of the market to renew themselves every day, expand their capabilities and strongly “take root” in the AI era — an entirely new, complex and unpredictable layer, yet one that holds boundless potential and opportunity.
content.p2:
Before the storm, only trees with strong enough roots can stand firm. An organization of individuals confident in their diverse capabilities, ready to create and embrace challenges and to master change, is one that not only stands firm against turbulence but also harnesses every advantage to conquer the challenges of the times. More than just the name of a new chapter in the organization's journey, “Root Further” is also an encouragement for each of us to dare to believe in ourselves, dare to dig deep, unlock every potential, break every limit and become the most versatile and excellent version of ourselves. Because in the AI era, diverse capability and harnessing the power of the times are the prerequisites for endurance.
No one knows in advance how many hidden “geological” layers lie deep within the “earth” of the modern technology industry and market. We only know that once “Root Further” has become our rooted spirit, we will not be afraid, but ever more eager before any uncharted territory on the road ahead. For we always believe that within those boundless realms lie countless wonders and opportunities to rise, waiting for us.

items.topTalent: Honoring the top individuals excelling in every aspect
items.topProject: Honoring the top projects excelling in every aspect, with outstanding revenue
items.topProjectLeader: Honoring the leaders who inspire and drive breakthrough projects
items.bestManager: Honoring managers with strong management skills who lead their teams
items.signatureCreator: Honoring managers with strong management skills who lead their teams
items.mvp: Honoring managers with strong management skills who lead their teams

kudos.label: Recognition movement
kudos.title: Sun* Kudos
kudos.body: A movement to recognize and thank colleagues — held for the very first time for all Sunners. Launching in November 2025, it encourages Sun* people to share words of recognition and thanks to colleagues on the system announced by the organizers. This will be material for the Heads Council to reference when selecting award recipients.

rules.title: Rules
rules.receiverHeading: KUDOS RECEIVERS: HERO BADGES FOR POSITIVE IMPACT
rules.receiverIntro: Based on how many teammates send you Kudos, you earn a matching Hero badge, shown right next to your profile name.
rules.tierNewDesc: The journey of spreading good has begun — the first words of thanks and recognition have found their way to you.
rules.tierRisingDesc: You are growing in your teammates' hearts through your kindness and dedication.
rules.tierSuperDesc: You have become a trusted and beloved icon — always ready to help and remembered by many teammates.
rules.tierLegendCount: More than 20 people sent you Kudos
rules.tierLegendDesc: You have become a legend — someone who leaves an unforgettable mark on the team through heart and action.
rules.senderHeading: KUDOS SENDERS: COLLECT ALL 6 ICONS, GET A MYSTERY GIFT
rules.senderIntro: Every Kudos you send is published on the system and earns ❤️ from the Sunner community. For every 5 ❤️, you open 1 Secret Box for a chance to receive one of SAA's 6 exclusive icons.
rules.senderOutro: Sunners who collect all 6 icons will receive a mystery gift from SAA 2025.
rules.nationalBody: The 5 Kudos with the most ❤️ across all of Sun* will officially become National Kudos and receive a special gift from SAA 2025: Root Further.

kudos.inputPlaceholder: Who would you like to thank and recognize today?
kudos.campaignTitle: x2 Hearts Day — spread twice the love!
kudos.campaignBody: From XX:XX on XX/12 to XX:XX on XX/12, every heart you receive is doubled.

compose.title: Send appreciation and recognition to your teammates
compose.titlePlaceholder: Give a title to your teammate
compose.titleHint1: Example: The person who motivates me.
compose.titleHint2: The title will appear as the heading of your Kudos.
compose.messagePlaceholder: Share your appreciation and recognition for your teammate here!
compose.mentionHint: You can use "@ + name" to mention other colleagues
compose.imageInvalidFormat: Invalid file format. Only jpg, png accepted.
compose.missingRequired: Please fill in Recipient, Message, and Hashtag to send your Kudos!
compose.error: Could not send your Kudo. Please try again.

awardSystem.subtitle: Sun* Annual Awards 2025
awardSystem.title: SAA 2025 Award System
awardSystem.heroAlt: ROOT FURTHER — Sun* Annual Awards 2025 keyvisual

topTalent.title: Top Talent
topTalent.description: The Top Talent award honours all-round outstanding individuals — those who continually affirm solid professional expertise and exceptional performance, consistently delivering value beyond expectations and highly regarded by clients and teammates. Ready to take on any mission the organisation entrusts, they are a source of inspiration, driving motivation and creating positive impact across the whole team.

topProject.title: Top Project
topProject.description: The Top Project award honours outstanding project teams that combine business results beyond expectations, optimal operational efficiency and a dedicated working spirit. These are projects of high technical complexity, optimal resource and cost efficiency, proposing valuable ideas for clients, delivering superior profit and earning positive client feedback. Members strictly follow internal development standards, setting a model of excellence and professionalism.

topProjectLeader.title: Top Project Leader
topProjectLeader.description: The Top Project Leader award honours outstanding project managers — those who combine solid management capability, a strong ability to inspire, and an “Aim High – Be Agile” mindset across every problem and context. Under their leadership, members not only overcome challenges and reach their goals together but also keep the fire of enthusiasm and the Wasshoi spirit alive, growing into a finer, happier version of themselves.

bestManager.title: Best Manager
bestManager.description: The Best Manager award honours exemplary leaders — those who have led their teams to results beyond expectations, with outstanding impact on business performance and the sustainable growth of the organisation. Under their leadership, the team conquers and masters every goal through multitasking capability, effective coordination and flexible application of technology in the digital era. They inspire the team to become confident and full of energy, ready to embrace — and even lead — revolutionary change.

signature.title: Signature 2025 - Creator
signature.description: The Signature award honours an individual or team that embodies the distinctive spirit Sun* pursues in each era. In 2025, the Signature award honours the Creator — an individual/team with a proactive, sharp mindset, always seeing opportunity in challenge and pioneering in action. They are quick to spot problems, identify them and offer practical solutions that bring clear value to projects, clients or the organisation. With a creator's mindset and Sun*'s distinctive “Creator” spirit, they not only respond positively to change but proactively create improvements, helping shape new standards for how Sun* people create value.

mvp.title: MVP (Most Valuable Person)
mvp.description: The MVP award honours the most outstanding individual of the year — the representative face of the entire Sun* collective. They have shown superior capability, persistent dedication and far-reaching influence, leaving a strong mark on Sun*'s journey throughout the year. Beyond performance and results, they are a source of spreading inspiration — through their thinking, action and positive influence on the collective. The MVP fully embodies the qualities of an outstanding Sunner while carrying the great responsibility of becoming the role model for Sun*'s people and spirit, helping lead the collective toward new heights.
